case_title: KATERYNA GALAFEYEVA VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF, KATERYNA GALAFEYEVA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-01-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-21-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
